text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry for making you worry...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But this really isn't a big deal. All I need is a short
break, and I'll be back on my feet in no time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm a pretty hardy person, see!
choice_data_list: You should still rest, just in case.
We can train, but let's keep things easy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but I'm really fine, I promi—
choice_data_list:
We can start training after you're fully
recovered.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Urgh... O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I guess they do say that one injury can lead to
another...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right then, I'll focus all my energy on getting
better! I'm gonna go all out on recuperating!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Good night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black heads back to her dorm with a firm
look of resolve on her face.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yay, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, I won't push myself too much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm off, then!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Gotta run slow and steady! Huh? Wait, is my form
correct?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Should I raise my legs more? Or is it my arms that
are the problem? It sure is hard to run while
managing an injury... Erm...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oww!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Now I've done it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, I won't push myself too much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm off, then!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... So far, so good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black doesn't have any issues after that,
and she's able to switch back to her regular
training right away.
